# AI Business — aibusiness.vc

> The definitive guide to making money with AI. Real methods, honest income numbers, tool reviews, startup data, and case studies.

## About

AI Business (aibusiness.vc) helps individuals and businesses earn money using artificial intelligence. 125+ articles, 57 tool reviews, 36 model profiles, 20 model comparisons, 11 salary profiles, and 10 country regulation pages. All content connects AI to money — how to earn it, save it, or invest in it.

## Solo — Make Money with AI as an Individual
- [AI Automation Agency Guide](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-automation-agency-guide): Start an AI automation agency ($10K-$100K/month)
- [HeadshotPro $300K/Month](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/headshot-pro-300k-month): Solo developer earning $300K/month with AI headshots
- [AI Consultant $34K/Month](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-consultant-34k-month): 7 retainer clients, $34K monthly income
- [Solo Founder Sold for $80M](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/solo-founder-sold-80m): Base44 sold to Wix for $80M in 6 months
- [AI Freelancing Guide](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-freelancing-complete-guide): From $0 to $10K/month
- [Solopreneur $200/Month Stack](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/solopreneur-tech-stack-cost): $200/month replaces $50K/year team
- [AI Blog Writer $12K/Month](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-blog-writer-12k-month): 60-80 posts/month, $9K-12K income

## Startups — AI Company Revenue & Funding
- [OpenAI $13B ARR](https://aibusiness.vc/startups/openai-13b-arr): Fastest revenue ramp in tech history
- [Anthropic $5B ARR](https://aibusiness.vc/startups/anthropic-5b-arr): Claude revenue machine at $183B valuation
- [Midjourney $500M, Zero Funding](https://aibusiness.vc/startups/midjourney-500m-zero-funding): 40 employees, $12.5M revenue per person
- [$150B AI Funding 2025](https://aibusiness.vc/startups/ai-funding-150b-2025): Where the money went

## B2B — AI Implementation ROI
- [Klarna Saves $40M/Year](https://aibusiness.vc/b2b/klarna-ai-replaces-700-agents): AI replaces 700 agents
- [JPMorgan Saves 360K Hours](https://aibusiness.vc/b2b/jpmorgan-ai-360k-hours): $150M+ annual value
- [GitHub Copilot $2B ARR](https://aibusiness.vc/b2b/github-copilot-2b-arr): 46% of code is AI-generated
- [AI Fraud Detection $10B+](https://aibusiness.vc/b2b/ai-fraud-detection-billions): Banks save billions
